title: Salted Food
description: Add a new Food in your World !
body:
Salted Food: Spice Up Your Survival!

Tired of eating bland, tasteless meat? Salted Food is a lightweight and immersive mod that introduces salt mechanics to Minecraft. Stop just cooking your food—season it to maximize its potential!
🧂 Key Features

   - Salt Ore: Discover salt veins deep within the Overworld. Easy to mine, this is the foundation of your new culinary journey.

   - Seasoning System: Combine your cooked meats (beef, pork, chicken, mutton, rabbit) with salt in your crafting table to create "Salted" versions.

   - Saturation Boost: Salted food doesn't just fill your hunger bar; it significantly increases saturation, allowing you to work or fight longer before needing another snack.

   - Vanilla+ Balance: Designed to fit seamlessly into the default Minecraft experience without breaking the game's original feel.

🥩 Why Salted Food?

In vanilla Minecraft, food management can quickly become a chore. With this mod, you finally have a reason to hit the mines for something other than diamonds. It’s the perfect addition for Survival servers, cooking-themed modpacks, or players looking to add a pinch of realism to their journey.
